name: @caistech/portfolio-gate
description: Portfolio Standard enforcement layer — errorResponse helper (R10), route smoke test (R13), auth smoke test (R1/R4), session smoke test (authenticated routes), static audits (R3/R7/R8/R9/R11/R15 + responsive-design), a LIVE RLS audit (R9 — queries the running DB so Drizzle-push/dashboard schemas and prod drift can't hide), and a `audit-all` master runner.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --input-type=module -e "import { runAuthSmoke, formatAuthResult } from './dist/smoke/auth.js'; const r = await runAuthSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'https://example.vercel.app', loginPath: '/login', signupPath: '/signup', forgotPasswordPath: '/forgot-password', magicLinkPath: '/login', loginActionPath: '/api/auth/login', signupActionPath: '/api/auth/signup', forgotPasswordActionPath: '/api/auth/forgot', magicLinkActionPath: '/api/auth/magic-link'}); console.log(formatAuthResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:routes: npm run build && node --input-type=module -e "import { runRouteSmoke, formatRouteResult } from './dist/smoke/routes.js'; const r = await runRouteSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'https://example.vercel.app', routes: [{path: '/'}]}); console.log(formatRouteResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:session: npm run build && node --input-type=module -e "import { runAuthSessionSmoke, formatSessionResult } from './dist/smoke/session.js'; const r = await runAuthSessionSmoke({baseUrl: process.env.TEST_BASE_URL || 'https://example.vercel.app', loginPath: '/login', loginActionPath: '/api/auth/login', protectedRoutes: ['/dashboard'], testEmail: process.env.TEST_EMAIL || '', testPassword: process.env.TEST_PASSWORD || ''}); console.log(formatSessionResult(r)); process.exit(r.passed ? 0 : 1)"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:auth && npm run test:routes && npm run test:session
